> 时间: 2026-03-08 01:00


## 1. 
- 来源: duckduckgo

IUPAC has now released the 2025 Top Ten Emerging Technologies in Chemistry . The goal of this initiative is to showcase the transformative value of chemistry and to inform the general public about the potential of the chemical sciences to foster the well-being of Society and the sustainability of our planet.
